contract.summary: navigation 运行时统一路线边（UiMapLink + waypoint 解析直连边）

joins: uimaplink.ParentUiMapID -> ChildUiMapID 提供 UiMap 显式链接
waypointedge.Start -> End 提供传送门 / 飞艇 / 船只等显式旅行边
uimapassignment 仅用于 UiMap <-> MapID 关系，不使用 Region 坐标
select: nodes dataset：node_key, route_source, source_id, ui_map_id, map_id, node_name

edges dataset：edge_index, route_source, source_row_id, from_node_key, to_node_key, edge_cost, edge_label, mode, portal_world_map_id, portal_world_x, portal_world_y, arrival_world_map_id, arrival_world_x, arrival_world_y
where: 运行时统一边禁止手写 id
运行时统一边禁止使用 Region_*、矩形覆盖、轨迹坐标或 SafeLoc 坐标推导地图联接
运行时统一边允许使用 waypoint 节点名称与 portal SafeLoc 点位解析主城传送与公共交通直连边
query.row_granularity: nodes 一行代表一个运行时路线节点；edges 一行代表一条可直接进入路径图的运行时路线边

nodes.sql: SELECT 'uimap_' || CAST(map.ID AS TEXT) AS node_key, 'uimap' AS route_source, CAST(map.ID AS INTEGER) AS source_id, CAST(map.ID AS INTEGER) AS ui_map_id, 0 AS map_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(map.Name_lang), ''), 'Map #' || CAST(map.ID AS TEXT)) AS node_name, CAST(COALESCE(map.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS node_flags, CAST(COALESCE(map.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS node_type, CAST(COALESCE(map.VisibilityPlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS condition_id FROM uimap map WHERE CAST(map.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 ORDER BY node_key

query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 UiMap 路线节点

edges.sql: WITH ui_map_candidates AS (SELECT DISTINCT CAST(u.ID AS INTEGER) AS ui_map_id, u.Name_lang AS ui_map_name, CAST(COALESCE(u.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS ui_map_type, CAST(COALESCE(u.System, 0) AS INTEGER) AS ui_map_system, CAST(COALESCE(a.MapID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_id FROM uimap u LEFT JOIN uimapassignment a ON CAST(a.UiMapID AS INTEGER) = CAST(u.ID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(u.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(COALESCE(u.System, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 AND CAST(COALESCE(u.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) IN (3, 6)), waypoint_edge_rows AS (SELECT CAST(e.ID AS INTEGER) AS edge_id, sn.Name_lang AS start_name, en.Name_lang AS end_name, CAST(COALESCE(ss.MapID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS start_map_id, CAST(COALESCE(es.MapID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS end_map_id, CAST(COALESCE(ss.Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS start_world_x, CAST(COALESCE(ss.Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS start_world_y, CAST(COALESCE(es.Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS end_world_x, CAST(COALESCE(es.Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS end_world_y, CAST(COALESCE(e.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id, CASE WHEN CAST(COALESCE(e.Field_8_1_5_29281_005, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CAST(e.Field_8_1_5_29281_005 AS INTEGER) ELSE 10 END AS edge_cost, TRIM(COALESCE(sn.Name_lang, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(en.Name_lang, '')) AS edge_text FROM waypointedge e JOIN waypointnode sn ON CAST(sn.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(e.Start AS INTEGER) JOIN waypointnode en ON CAST(en.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(e.End AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN waypointsafelocs ss ON CAST(ss.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(sn.SafeLocID AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN waypointsafelocs es ON CAST(es.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(en.SafeLocID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(e.ID AS INTEGER) > 0), from_candidates AS (SELECT wer.edge_id, c.ui_map_id, 0 AS priority, INSTR(COALESCE(wer.start_name, ''), c.ui_map_name) AS sort_pos, c.ui_map_type FROM waypoint_edge_rows wer JOIN ui_map_candidates c ON INSTR(COALESCE(wer.start_name, ''), c.ui_map_name) > 0 AND (wer.start_map_id <= 0 OR c.map_id = wer.start_map_id) UNION ALL SELECT wer.edge_id, c.ui_map_id, 1 AS priority, INSTR(wer.edge_text, c.ui_map_name) AS sort_pos, c.ui_map_type FROM waypoint_edge_rows wer JOIN ui_map_candidates c ON INSTR(wer.edge_text, c.ui_map_name) > 0 AND (wer.start_map_id <= 0 OR c.map_id = wer.start_map_id)), from_ranked AS (SELECT edge_id, ui_map_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY edge_id ORDER BY priority ASC, sort_pos ASC, CASE ui_map_type WHEN 3 THEN 0 WHEN 6 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, ui_map_id ASC) AS rank_index FROM from_candidates), from_resolved AS (SELECT edge_id, ui_map_id AS from_ui_map_id FROM from_ranked WHERE rank_index = 1), to_candidates AS (SELECT wer.edge_id, c.ui_map_id, 0 AS priority, INSTR(COALESCE(wer.end_name, ''), c.ui_map_name) AS sort_pos, c.ui_map_type FROM waypoint_edge_rows wer JOIN ui_map_candidates c ON INSTR(COALESCE(wer.end_name, ''), c.ui_map_name) > 0 AND (wer.end_map_id <= 0 OR c.map_id = wer.end_map_id) UNION ALL SELECT wer.edge_id, c.ui_map_id, 1 AS priority, -INSTR(wer.edge_text, c.ui_map_name) AS sort_pos, c.ui_map_type FROM waypoint_edge_rows wer JOIN ui_map_candidates c ON INSTR(wer.edge_text, c.ui_map_name) > 0 AND (wer.end_map_id <= 0 OR c.map_id = wer.end_map_id) JOIN from_resolved fr ON fr.edge_id = wer.edge_id WHERE c.ui_map_id <> fr.from_ui_map_id), to_ranked AS (SELECT edge_id, ui_map_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY edge_id ORDER BY priority ASC, sort_pos ASC, CASE ui_map_type WHEN 3 THEN 0 WHEN 6 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, ui_map_id ASC) AS rank_index FROM to_candidates), to_resolved AS (SELECT edge_id, ui_map_id AS to_ui_map_id FROM to_ranked WHERE rank_index = 1), link_edges AS (SELECT 'uimaplink_forward_' || CAST(link.ID AS TEXT) AS edge_key, 'uimaplink' AS route_source, CAST(link.ID AS INTEGER) AS source_row_id, 'uimap_' || CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS TEXT) AS from_node_key, 'uimap_' || CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS TEXT) AS to_node_key, CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) AS from_ui_map_id, CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS INTEGER) AS to_ui_map_id, 1 AS edge_cost, '前往' || COALESCE(child.Name_lang, ('Map #' || CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS TEXT))) AS edge_label, 'MAP_LINK' AS mode, CAST(COALESCE(link.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS flags, CAST(COALESCE(link.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id, 0 AS portal_world_map_id, 0 AS portal_world_x, 0 AS portal_world_y, 0 AS arrival_world_map_id, 0 AS arrival_world_x, 0 AS arrival_world_y FROM uimaplink link LEFT JOIN uimap child ON CAST(child.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(link.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'uimaplink_reverse_' || CAST(link.ID AS TEXT) AS edge_key, 'uimaplink' AS route_source, CAST(link.ID AS INTEGER) AS source_row_id, 'uimap_' || CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS TEXT) AS from_node_key, 'uimap_' || CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS TEXT) AS to_node_key, CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS INTEGER) AS from_ui_map_id, CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) AS to_ui_map_id, 1 AS edge_cost, '前往' || COALESCE(parent.Name_lang, ('Map #' || CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS TEXT))) AS edge_label, 'MAP_LINK' AS mode, CAST(COALESCE(link.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS flags, CAST(COALESCE(link.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id, 0 AS portal_world_map_id, 0 AS portal_world_x, 0 AS portal_world_y, 0 AS arrival_world_map_id, 0 AS arrival_world_x, 0 AS arrival_world_y FROM uimaplink link LEFT JOIN uimap parent ON CAST(parent.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(link.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0), waypoint_link_edges AS (SELECT 'waypoint_resolved_' || CAST(wer.edge_id AS TEXT) AS edge_key, 'waypointedge_resolved' AS route_source, wer.edge_id AS source_row_id, 'uimap_' || CAST(fr.from_ui_map_id AS TEXT) AS from_node_key, 'uimap_' || CAST(tr.to_ui_map_id AS TEXT) AS to_node_key, fr.from_ui_map_id AS from_ui_map_id, tr.to_ui_map_id AS to_ui_map_id, wer.edge_cost AS edge_cost, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wer.start_name), ''), '使用传送点') AS edge_label, 'WAYPOINT_LINK' AS mode, 0 AS flags, wer.player_condition_id AS player_condition_id, wer.start_map_id AS portal_world_map_id, wer.start_world_x AS portal_world_x, wer.start_world_y AS portal_world_y, wer.end_map_id AS arrival_world_map_id, wer.end_world_x AS arrival_world_x, wer.end_world_y AS arrival_world_y FROM waypoint_edge_rows wer JOIN from_resolved fr ON fr.edge_id = wer.edge_id JOIN to_resolved tr ON tr.edge_id = wer.edge_id WHERE fr.from_ui_map_id > 0 AND tr.to_ui_map_id > 0 AND fr.from_ui_map_id <> tr.to_ui_map_id) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY edge_key) AS edge_index, * FROM (SELECT * FROM link_edges UNION ALL SELECT * FROM waypoint_link_edges) ORDER BY edge_index

joins: uimap 自连接补齐地图名
waypoint 节点名称与 portal SafeLoc 点位用于解析主城传送 / 交通直连边
uimapassignment 仅用于 UiMap <-> MapID 关系，不使用 Region 坐标
where: 所有运行时边均由 DB 关系行生成
不包含 Region_*、矩形覆盖、轨迹点或 WAYPOINT_ACCESS 坐标接入边
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条统一运行时路线边

structure.lua_shape: Toolbox.Data.NavigationRouteEdges = { schemaVersion, sourceMode, generatedAt, nodes, edges }

change_log.summary: 初始契约版本，建立 navigation 运行时统一路线边出口；第一版纳入 Taxi 公共交通最终边
运行时统一路线边改为 DB 显式 UiMap/UiMapLink/Waypoint 关系导出，移除 TaxiPath 运行时边
移除 uimap.ParentUiMapID 运行时低成本路线边，增加 taxipathnode 轨迹经过 UiMap 序列作为地图前往边来源
增加基于 uimapassignment Region 覆盖关系导出的 MAP_REGION 前往边，用于普通飞行经过地图链路
收紧 MAP_REGION 普通交叠边：小型 UiMap 只走最大覆盖区域边，避免城市地图直接跨到远端区域
MAP_REGION 仅纳入父级为大陆的顶层 UiMap，排除试炼谷等子区域路线节点
城市/小地图归并到承载顶层 Zone 时允许 85% DB 覆盖，覆盖东部王国主城边界不完全包含的情况
MAP_REGION 允许 MapID=0，覆盖东部王国老世界区域图
顶层 Zone-to-Zone MAP_REGION 接壤阈值降为 5%，覆盖东部王国相邻区域边界交叠
MAP_REGION 恢复严格顶层 Zone 重叠阈值；MAP_TRACE 允许 ContinentID=0 以覆盖东部王国老世界轨迹
删除 MAP_REGION 与 MAP_TRACE；UiMapAssignment Region 仅允许用于定位 waypoint 节点，不再生成地图联接关系
删除 Waypoint/SafeLoc 坐标接入链路；运行时路线边只保留 uimaplink 明确 UiMap 链接
恢复基于 waypointedge 的显式主城传送/交通直连边；解析仅使用节点名称与 UiMap/MapID 关系，不使用坐标
为 waypoint 解析直连边补导 portal SafeLoc 世界坐标，用于路线步骤显示传送门位置
